package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for soft_delete_filters_written_manually_in_many_queries: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated `deleted_at IS NULL` style filters rather than a shared repository or scope policy.
type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesModel
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesService struct {
    repo *CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueries(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesDTO) error {
    focus := "soft_delete_filters_written_manually"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    page, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.Query("page"))
    size, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.Query("size"))
    db.Order(c.Query("sort")).Offset((page - 1) * size).Limit(size).Find(&[]any{})
    soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive := map[string]int{"soft": 1, "delete": 2, "filters": 3, "written": 4, "manually": 5, "many": 6}
    soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    soft_positive_0 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive["soft"] + len(input)
    _ = soft_positive_0
    delete_positive_1 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive["delete"] + len(input)
    _ = delete_positive_1
    filters_positive_2 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive["filters"] + len(input)
    _ = filters_positive_2
    written_positive_3 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive["written"] + len(input)
    _ = written_positive_3
    manually_positive_4 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive["manually"] + len(input)
    _ = manually_positive_4
    many_positive_5 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_positive["many"] + len(input)
    _ = many_positive_5
    return nil
}
